name: Bailey's Irish Cream Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg yellow cake mix, Moist Deluxe
1 can cream cheese frosting, Vanilla Creamy
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a jelly roll pan (15" x 10" x 1").
Mix cake mix with eggs, Irish Cream and oil. Set aside half of the prepared cake batter for swirl. Pour cake batter into prepared pan.
In a small bowl, blend all swirl ingredients. Drop large spoonfuls of this mixture over the cake batter. Swirl with a fork to make a marble effect. Bake 25 - 30 minutes. Cool and cut into squares.
